The '''chuka''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] hand-to-hand combat weapon.

Designed to fit over the hand, the chuka discharged a high-density shock sufficient to disable an opponent. The weapon was so closely associated with Bothan elite, that in some [[Star system/Legends|systems]], mere possession of a chuka was considered grounds for [[Death/Legends|execution]] as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
